title: Bitfarms June 2024 Operations and Expansion Plans
text: Bitfarms June 2024 operations showed company earned 189 BTC during month with installed hashrate increased to 11.4 EH/s and operational hashrate at 10.4 EH/s. Energy efficiency improved significantly to 25 w/TH, up 36% year-over-year and 7.4% month-over-month demonstrating operational improvements. Company entered agreement to develop new 120 MW site in Sharon, Pennsylvania strategically positioned within PJM market, largest wholesale electricity market in United States. Expansion plans indicated 2025 power capacity target more than doubling to 648 MW from existing 310 MW. In Paraguay operations, Paso Pe facility was energized with majority of warehouses and hydro containers operational contributing 2.5 EH/s with additional capacity to follow. These operational metrics showed company was executing on growth plans through 2024 before eventual strategic pivot later in year.
